violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a mop bucket. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs and raw meats) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (produce and jelly) in the walk-in refrigerator and 2 dr refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

whole cooked chicken was observed held at (103-122 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.Reheated Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

(Cole slaw and salad) was observed held at (58) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

Various prepared foods was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
Inspector observed a can a RAID roach spray within establishment.PIC informed to cease use New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

The presence of roaches is not controlled as evidenced by live and dead insects. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
Inspector observed single use buckets being used for storage of raw and cooked foods. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
Cold food display and the produce room located in the kitchen and retail area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

Wood is used in the construction of support for the hot hold unit(kitchen area) and display case(bakery area). Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 dr refrigerator has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
Inspector observed refuse area with a heavy accumulation off cardboard boxes and dumpster overflow of trash. New Violation. Correct By: 07/13/2023
The cold water faucet knob(missing) in the bakery area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

The ceilings and fans in the produce room area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the bakery area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2023
